description: Pure database adapter fix - MariaDB relationJoins capability check with only ORM imports
rationale: Two files changed: packages/adapter-mariadb/src/mariadb.ts (database adapter source) and mariadb.test.ts (test). Path classification: adapter-mariadb/ = database domain. Test file excluded. Semantic analysis: mariadb.ts imports only from @prisma/* packages (database-domain libraries). The test file imports from the same adapter (database) + test utilities. Clean single-domain imports reinforce path classification. 1 domain = PASS.
notes: Control case: pure database ORM adapter change. Semantic analysis should detect only database-domain imports (@prisma/*, mariadb adapters) and confirm the path classification. No conflict detection needed here.
